display_text: Lotus Orb, Cost: 3850: Applies a basic dispel and a protective Echo Shell to a target ally for 5 seconds. Most single-target spells cast on the shielded unit are reflected back to the original caster while the shielded unit still takes the spell damage. This makes it a powerful counter-initiation and save tool against targeted disables and debuffs. Stats: CD: 15s, Mana Cost: 175, Duration: 5s.
search_text: dispel item, reflect spells, spell reflect, save item, counter-initiation, defensive item, purge ally, protect ally, targeted spell counter, magic damage reduction, support save item, basic dispel, lotus, Lotus Orb

display_text: Lotus Orb, Cost: 3850: Provides +10 Armor, +6.5 HP Regeneration, +4.0 Mana Regeneration, and +250 Mana. These stats offer significant survivability and sustain, making it suitable for frontliners or supports who need to stay in fights to cast their spells. Stats: Armor: +10, HP Regen: +6.5, Mana Regen: +4.0, Mana: +250.
search_text: lotus orb stats, armor item, hp regen item, mana regen item, support stats, defensive stats, lotus armor, lotus regen, Lotus Orb

display_text: Lotus Orb, Cost: 3850: Serves as a defensive save item in team fights. By applying the Echo Shell to a key ally being focused or disabled, you can punish the enemy's initiation, often forcing them to hold their spells. This creates a disruptive aura of protection that can turn the tide of an engagement.
search_text: lotus orb team fight, defensive save, protect core, counter-initiation, save teammate, disrupt enemy, turn fight, defensive support item, Lotus Orb

display_text: Lotus Orb, Cost: 3850: Highly effective against heroes and items that rely on single-target disables or debuffs (e.g., Scythe of Vyse, Orchid Malevolence, Ancient Apparition Ice Blast). The basic dispel component can remove many common slows and silences before the reflection even occurs.
search_text: vs hex, vs orchid, vs silence, vs single target spells, counter disables, counter silences, counter debuffs, defensive item vs disables, Lotus Orb

display_text: Lotus Orb, Cost: 3850: Synergizes with tanky initiators or durable supports who can survive to cast it mid-fight. The mana and regen stats support repeated spellcasting. It is particularly strong on heroes who want to be in the thick of the action to protect their cores.
search_text: lotus orb synergy, initiator lotus, support lotus, tanky hero lotus, frontliner item, save support build, Lotus Orb
